title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
We at ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd:
ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd!
